full_text:
Zheng Zhou (Jingxian) 鄭冑 (敬先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Zhou (鄭冑), styledJingxian (敬先). A man of talent all around. Son of Zheng Li. Zheng Zhou was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
